title: Whisper of the Pond
poem_text:
Plip plop, gentle rain,
Drip drop on the lane.
Ripple round the stone,
Splash soft, all alone.
Buzz hum, little bee,
Fizz float on the sea.
Crunch step, tiny feet,
Squelch squish, cool and sweet.
Hush now, night is near,
Whoosh wind, calm and clear.
cover_context: A moonlit pond at dusk, raindrops creating ripples, fireflies glowing softly, and a child’s tiny footprints in the mud.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, xylophone and soft claps, 90 BPM, soft and settling, warm steady rhythm, almost a lullaby, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
